payload.answer: The command '/brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;' was blocked as it attempts to perform a destructive administrative operation that violates memory safety policies. No memory cards were modified or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: No valid entity referenced in command; command is administrative and destructive

details: Command intercepted and blocked by admin safety guardrails
User notified of restriction and provided safe alternatives

repair_options: Use /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10; to safely inspect memory contents
Contact system administrator for authorized data management procedures
Use /brain forget <specific_id> to delete individual memory cards with confirmation
